**Subject:** Extension Request - [Course Name] - [Project Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to respectfully request a short extension on the [Project Name] project, which is currently due this [Day of the week], [Date]. Due to [brief, professional reason, e.g., an unexpected family commitment, a heavier-than-anticipated workload this week, or a minor technical issue], I have fallen slightly behind schedule and am concerned that I will not be able to submit my best work by the original deadline.

I sincerely apologize for the late notice and for any inconvenience this request may cause. I have made significant progress on the project, but I need a little more time to ensure the quality of the final submission meets your standards.

Would it be possible to submit the project by [Propose a specific new date, e.g., Friday evening, two days from now]? I am confident that this extra time will allow me to complete the project thoroughly and submit high-quality work.

I sincerely apologize again for needing to ask for this extension. Thank you very much for considering my request.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID]<turn|>
